ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 渲染方法描述与返回值

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Render method description and parameters list
ast.target: 渲染方法描述与参数列表

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Render method description, parameters list, and return
ast.target: 渲染方法描述、参数列表与返回值

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 添加新文件正则表达式

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 将文件夹添加到忽略列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files in this folder will be available as templates.
ast.target: 此文件夹中的文件将可用作模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine how you'd like to have user script intellisense render. Note values will not render if not in the script.
ast.target: 确定用户脚本智能感知的呈现方式。请注意，如果不在脚本中，值将不会呈现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum timeout in seconds for a system command.
ast.target: 系统命令的最大超时时间（秒）。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Trigger Templater on new file creation

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用用户系统命令功能

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 创建文件时忽略的文件夹

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 添加额外的文件夹模板

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 添加额外的文件正则表达式

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Add folder to ignore on file creation
ast.target: 添加在文件创建时忽略的文件夹

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` failed because your server does not serve wasm with `application/wasm` MIME type. Falling back to `WebAssembly.instantiate` which is slower. Original error:
ast.target: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` 失败，因为您的服务器未使用 `application/wasm` MIME 类型提供 wasm。回退到较慢的 `WebAssembly.instantiate`。原始错误：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Templater: Failed to enter insert mode for vim users.
ast.target: Templater：无法为 vim 用户进入插入模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Template file path (relative to vault root or templates folder)
ast.target: 模板文件路径（相对于库根目录或模板文件夹）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Output file path (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 输出文件路径（相对于库根目录）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open the created file in the UI
ast.target: 在用户界面中打开创建的文件

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes the app instance. Prefer to use this over the global app instance.
ast.target: 此模块暴露应用实例。建议优先使用此实例而非全局应用实例。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes custom made scripts, written by yourself within the script file folder location
ast.target: 此模块暴露您自己在脚本文件夹位置编写的自定义脚本。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This module exposes Templater's running configuration.

This is mostly useful when writing scripts requiring some context information.
ast.target:
此模块暴露 Templater 的运行配置。

这在编写需要上下文信息的脚本时最为有用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `TFile` object representing the template file.
ast.target: 代表模板文件的 `TFile` 对象。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `TFile` object representing the target file where the template will be inserted.
ast.target: 代表模板将要插入的目标文件的 `TFile` 对象。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The `RunMode`, representing the way Templater was launched (Create new from template, Append to active file, ...).
ast.target: 代表 Templater 启动方式的 `RunMode`（从模板创建新文件、追加到活动文件等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The active file (if existing) when launching Templater.
ast.target: 启动 Templater 时的活动文件（如果存在）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module contains every internal function related to dates.
ast.target: 此模块包含所有与日期相关的内部函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format for the date. Defaults to `"YYYY-MM-DD"`. Refer to the [Momentjs format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).
ast.target: 日期的格式。默认为 `"YYYY-MM-DD"`。请参考 [Momentjs 格式参考](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Duration to offset the date from. If a number is provided, duration will be added to the date in days. You can also specify the offset as a string using the ISO 8601 format.
ast.target: 从日期偏移的持续时间。如果提供数字，持续时间将以天为单位添加到日期中。您也可以使用ISO 8601格式的字符串指定偏移量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The date to use instead of today's date, e.g. set this to the note's title.
ast.target: 用于替代今天日期的日期，例如，将其设置为笔记的标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format for the reference date. Refer to the [Momentjs format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).
ast.target: 参考日期的格式。请参考[Momentjs格式参考](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Week day number. If the locale assigns Monday as the first day of the week, `0` will be Monday, `-7` will be last week's day.
ast.target: 星期几的数字。如果区域设置将星期一作为一周的第一天，则`0`表示星期一，`-7`表示上周的同一天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reference date to use instead of today, e.g. set this to the note's title.
ast.target: 用于替代今天的参考日期，例如，将其设置为笔记的标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module contains every internal function related to files.
ast.target: 此模块包含所有与文件相关的内部函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The string contents of the file at the time that Templater was executed. Manipulating this string will *not* update the current file.
ast.target: 执行Templater时文件中的字符串内容。操作此字符串*不会*更新当前文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a new file using a specified template or with a specified content.
ast.target: 使用指定的模板或指定的内容创建新文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Either the template used for the new file content, or the file content as a string. If it is the template to use, you retrieve it with `tp.file.find_tfile(TEMPLATENAME)`.
ast.target: 用于新文件内容的模板或文件内容字符串。如果是模板，你需要使用 `tp.file.find_tfile(TEMPLATENAME)` 来获取。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The filename of the new file, defaults to "Untitled".
ast.target: 新文件的文件名，默认为"Untitled"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to open or not the newly created file. Warning: if you use this option, since commands are executed asynchronously, the file can be opened first and then other commands are appended to that new file and not the previous file.
ast.target: 是否打开新创建的文件。警告：如果使用此选项，由于命令是异步执行的，文件可能会先被打开，然后其他命令会追加到该新文件中，而不是之前的文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The folder to put the new file in, defaults to Obsidian's default location. If you want the file to appear in a different folder, specify it with `"PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME"` or `tp.app.vault.getAbstractFileByPath("PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME")`.
ast.target: 放置新文件的文件夹，默认为 Obsidian 的默认位置。如果你希望文件出现在不同的文件夹中，请使用 `"PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME"` 或 `tp.app.vault.getAbstractFileByPath("PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME")` 指定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the current file's creation date.
ast.target: 获取当前文件的创建日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format for the date. Defaults to `"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"`. Refer to [format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).
ast.target: 日期的格式。默认为 `"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"`。请参考 [格式参考](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Sets the cursor to this location after the template has been inserted. 

You can navigate between the different cursors using the configured hotkey in Obsidian settings.
ast.target:
在模板插入后将光标设置到此位置。

你可以使用 Obsidian 设置中配置的热键在不同的光标之间导航。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The order of the different cursors jump, e.g. it will jump from 1 to 2 to 3, and so on.
If you specify multiple tp.file.cursor with the same order, the editor will switch to multi-cursor.
ast.target:
不同光标跳转的顺序，例如它会从 1 跳到 2 再到 3，以此类推。
如果你指定了多个具有相同顺序的 tp.file.cursor，编辑器将切换到多光标模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Appends some content after the active cursor in the file.
ast.target: 在文件中的活动光标后追加一些内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The content to append after the active cursor.
ast.target: 要在活动光标后追加的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check to see if a file exists by it's file path. The full path to the file, relative to the Vault and containing the extension, must be provided.
ast.target: 通过文件路径检查文件是否存在。必须提供文件的完整路径（相对于库，包含扩展名）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full file path of the file we want to check existence for.
ast.target: 我们要检查其存在性的文件的完整文件路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for a file and returns its `TFile` instance.
ast.target: 搜索文件并返回其 `TFile` 实例。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The filename we want to search and resolve as a `TFile`.
ast.target: 我们要搜索并解析为 `TFile` 的文件名。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 检索文件的文件夹名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to `true`, returns the vault-absolute path of the folder. If `false`, only returns the basename of the folder (the last part). Defaults to `false`.
ast.target: 如果设置为 `true`，则返回库的绝对路径。如果为 `false`，则仅返回文件夹的基本名称（最后一部分）。默认为 `false`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Includes the file's link content. Templates in the included content will be resolved.
ast.target: 包含文件的链接内容。包含内容中的模板将被解析。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The link to the file to include, e.g. `"[[MyFile]]"`, or a TFile object. Also supports sections or blocks inclusions.
ast.target: 要包含的文件的链接，例如 `"[[MyFile]]"`，或一个 TFile 对象。也支持包含章节或块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the file's last modification date.
ast.target: 检索文件的最后修改日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moves the file to the desired vault location.
ast.target: 将文件移动到所需的库位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new vault relative path of the file, without the file extension. Note: the new path needs to include the folder and the filename, e.g. `"/Notes/MyNote"`.
ast.target: 文件的新库相对路径，不包含文件扩展名。注意：新路径需要包含文件夹和文件名，例如 `"/Notes/MyNote"`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The file to move, defaults to the current file.
ast.target: 要移动的文件，默认为当前文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the file's absolute path on the system.
ast.target: 获取文件在系统中的绝对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to `true`, only retrieves the vault's relative path.
ast.target: 如果设置为 `true`，则仅获取库的相对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Renames the file (keeps the same file extension).
ast.target: 重命名文件（保留相同的文件扩展名）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the active file's text selection.
ast.target: 获取活动文件的文本选择内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the file's tags (array of string).
ast.target: 获取文件的标签（字符串数组）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This modules exposes all the frontmatter variables of a file as variables.
ast.target: 此模块将文件的所有 frontmatter 变量作为变量公开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes hooks that allow you to execute code when a Templater event occurs.
ast.target: 此模块暴露了钩子，允许你在 Templater 事件发生时执行代码。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Hooks into when all actively running templates have finished executing. Most of the time this will be a single template, unless you are using `tp.file.include` or `tp.file.create_new`.

Multiple invokations of this method will have their callback functions run in parallel.
ast.target:
钩入所有正在运行的模板执行完毕时。大多数情况下这只是一个模板，除非你使用了 `tp.file.include` 或 `tp.file.create_new`。

多次调用此方法将并行运行其回调函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Callback function that will be executed when all actively running templates have finished executing.
ast.target: 当所有正在运行的模板执行完毕时，将执行的回调函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes all the functions and classes from the Obsidian API.
ast.target: 此模块暴露了 Obsidian API 中的所有函数和类。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module contains system related functions.
ast.target: 此模块包含与系统相关的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spawns a prompt modal and returns the user's input.
ast.target: 弹出一个提示模态框并返回用户的输入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text placed above the input field.

ast.name: description
ast.source: A default value for the input field.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Throws an error if the prompt is canceled, instead of returning a `null` value.
ast.target: 如果提示被取消，则抛出错误，而不是返回 `null` 值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to `true`, the input field will be a multiline textarea. Defaults to `false`.
ast.target: 如果设置为 `true`，输入字段将变为多行文本区域。默认为 `false`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spawns a suggester prompt and returns the user's chosen item.
ast.target: 弹出一个建议提示框，并返回用户选择的项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of strings representing the text that will be displayed for each item in the suggester prompt. This can also be a function that maps an item to its text representation.
ast.target: 字符串数组，表示建议提示框中每个项目显示的文本。也可以是一个将项目映射为其文本表示的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array containing the values of each item in the correct order.
ast.target: 包含每个项目正确顺序值的数组。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 提示框的占位符字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of items rendered at once (useful to improve performance when displaying large lists).
ast.target: 限制一次渲染的项目数量（有助于在显示大型列表时提高性能）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default value to initialize the suggester with.
ast.target: 用于初始化建议提示框的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spawns a suggester prompt that supports selecting multiple items and returns the user's chosen items.
ast.target: 弹出一个支持多选的建议提示框，并返回用户选择的项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text placed at the top of the modal.
ast.target: 放置在模态框顶部的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default values to initialize the suggester with.
ast.target: 用于初始化建议提示框的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This modules contains every internal function related to the web (making web requests).
ast.target: 此模块包含与网络（发起网络请求）相关的所有内部函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves and parses the daily quote from `https://github.com/Zachatoo/quotes-database` as a callout.
ast.target: 从 `https://github.com/Zachatoo/quotes-database` 获取并解析每日名言，以标注形式呈现。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 从 `https://unsplash.com/` 获取一张随机图片。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 图片尺寸格式为 `<宽度>x<高度>`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limits selection to photos matching a search term. Multiple search terms can be passed separated by a comma.
ast.target: 将选择范围限制为与搜索词匹配的照片。多个搜索词可用逗号分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional argument to include the specified size in the image link markdown. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 可选参数，用于在图片链接的 Markdown 中包含指定尺寸。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes a HTTP request to the specified URL. Optionally, you can specify a path to extract specific data from the response.
ast.target: 向指定 URL 发起 HTTP 请求。可选择指定路径以从响应中提取特定数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL to which the HTTP request will be made.

ast.name: description
ast.source: A path within the response JSON to extract specific data.
ast.target: 响应 JSON 中用于提取特定数据的路径。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Replace templates in the active file
ast.target: 替换活动文件中的模板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 跳转到下一个光标位置

ast.name: name
ast.source: Get start of month from note title

ast.name: name
ast.source: Get end of month from note title

ast.name: name
ast.source: File creation and open created note
ast.target: 创建文件并打开已创建的笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在当前文件夹中创建文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: File creation in specified folder with string path
ast.target: 使用字符串路径在指定文件夹中创建文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: File creation in specified folder with TFolder
ast.target: 使用TFolder在指定文件夹中创建文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: File creation and append link to current note
ast.target: 创建文件并附加链接到当前笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 带格式的文件创建日期

ast.name: name
ast.target: 带有库绝对路径的文件文件夹（路径/到/文件夹）

ast.name: name
ast.source: File last modified date with format
ast.target: 文件最后修改日期（带格式）

ast.name: name
ast.source: File relative path (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 文件相对路径（相对于仓库根目录）

ast.name: name
ast.source: File append a 2 to the file name

ast.name: name
ast.source: Strip the Zettelkasten ID of title (if space separated)
ast.target: 去除标题中的 Zettelkasten ID（如果以空格分隔）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Suggester with mapping function (same as above example)
ast.target: 带映射函数的建议器（与上述示例相同）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Multi-suggester with mapping function (same as above example)
ast.target: 带映射函数的多建议器（与上述示例相同）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Random picture with size and query
ast.target: 指定尺寸和查询的随机图片

ast.name: text
ast.target: 请查看控制台以获取更多信息

regex.source: description:"The string contents of the file at the time that Templater was executed. Manipulating this string will *not* update the current file."
regex.target: description:"The string contents of the file at the time that Templater was executed. Manipulating this string will *not* update the current file."

regex.source: description:"Creates a new file using a specified template or with a specified content."
regex.target: description:"Creates a new file using a specified template or with a specified content."

regex.source: description:"Either the template used for the new file content, or the file content as a string. If it is the template to use, you retrieve it with `tp.file.find_tfile(TEMPLATENAME)`."
regex.target: description:"Either the template used for the new file content, or the file content as a string. If it is the template to use, you retrieve it with `tp.file.find_tfile(TEMPLATENAME)`."

regex.source: description:'The filename of the new file, defaults to "Untitled".'
regex.target: description:'The filename of the new file, defaults to "Untitled".'

regex.source: description:"Whether to open or not the newly created file. Warning: if you use this option, since commands are executed asynchronously, the file can be opened first and then other commands are appended to that new file and not the previous file."
regex.target: description:"Whether to open or not the newly created file. Warning: if you use this option, since commands are executed asynchronously, the file can be opened first and then other commands are appended to that new file and not the previous file."

regex.source: name:"File creation and open created note"
regex.target: name:"File creation and open created note"

regex.source: name:"File creation in specified folder with string path"
regex.target: name:"File creation in specified folder with string path"

regex.source: name:"File creation in specified folder with TFolder"
regex.target: name:"File creation in specified folder with TFolder"

regex.source: name:"File creation and append link to current note"
regex.target: name:"File creation and append link to current note"

regex.source: description:"Retrieves the current file's creation date."
regex.target: description:"Retrieves the current file's creation date."

regex.source: description:'The format for the date. Defaults to `"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"`. Refer to [format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).'
regex.target: description:'The format for the date. Defaults to `"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"`. Refer to [format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).'

regex.source:
description:`Sets the cursor to this location after the template has been inserted. 

You can navigate between the different cursors using the configured hotkey in Obsidian settings.
`
regex.target:
description:`Sets the cursor to this location after the template has been inserted. 

You can navigate between the different cursors using the configured hotkey in Obsidian settings.
`

regex.source: description:"Appends some content after the active cursor in the file."
regex.target: description:"Appends some content after the active cursor in the file."

regex.source: description:"The content to append after the active cursor."
regex.target: description:"The content to append after the active cursor."

regex.source: description:"Check to see if a file exists by it's file path. The full path to the file, relative to the Vault and containing the extension, must be provided."
regex.target: description:"Check to see if a file exists by it's file path. The full path to the file, relative to the Vault and containing the extension, must be provided."

regex.source: description:"The full file path of the file we want to check existence for."
regex.target: description:"The full file path of the file we want to check existence for."

regex.source: description:"Search for a file and returns its `TFile` instance."
regex.target: description:"Search for a file and returns its `TFile` instance."

regex.source: description:"The filename we want to search and resolve as a `TFile`."
regex.target: description:"The filename we want to search and resolve as a `TFile`."

regex.source: description:"If set to `true`, returns the vault-absolute path of the folder. If `false`, only returns the basename of the folder (the last part). Defaults to `false`."
regex.target: description:"If set to `true`, returns the vault-absolute path of the folder. If `false`, only returns the basename of the folder (the last part). Defaults to `false`."

regex.source: description:"Includes the file's link content. Templates in the included content will be resolved."
regex.target: description:"Includes the file's link content. Templates in the included content will be resolved."

regex.source: description:'The link to the file to include, e.g. `"[[MyFile]]"`, or a TFile object. Also supports sections or blocks inclusions.'
regex.target: description:'The link to the file to include, e.g. `"[[MyFile]]"`, or a TFile object. Also supports sections or blocks inclusions.'

regex.source: description:"Retrieves the file's last modification date."
regex.target: description:"Retrieves the file's last modification date."

regex.source: name:"File last modified date with format"
regex.target: name:"File last modified date with format"

regex.source: description:"Moves the file to the desired vault location."
regex.target: description:"Moves the file to the desired vault location."

regex.source: description:'The new vault relative path of the file, without the file extension. Note: the new path needs to include the folder and the filename, e.g. `"/Notes/MyNote"`.'
regex.target: description:'The new vault relative path of the file, without the file extension. Note: the new path needs to include the folder and the filename, e.g. `"/Notes/MyNote"`.'

regex.source: description:"The file to move, defaults to the current file."
regex.target: description:"The file to move, defaults to the current file."

regex.source: description:"Retrieves the file's absolute path on the system."
regex.target: description:"Retrieves the file's absolute path on the system."

regex.source: description:"If set to `true`, only retrieves the vault's relative path."
regex.target: description:"If set to `true`, only retrieves the vault's relative path."

regex.source: name:"File relative path (relative to vault root)"
regex.target: name:"File relative path (relative to vault root)"

regex.source: description:"Renames the file (keeps the same file extension)."
regex.target: description:"Renames the file (keeps the same file extension)."

regex.source: description:"Retrieves the active file's text selection."
regex.target: description:"Retrieves the active file's text selection."

regex.source: description:"Retrieves the file's tags (array of string)."
regex.target: description:"Retrieves the file's tags (array of string)."

regex.source: name:"Strip the Zettelkasten ID of title (if space separated)"
regex.target: name:"Strip the Zettelkasten ID of title (if space separated)"

regex.target: description:"This module exposes hooks that allow you to execute code when a Templater event occurs."

regex.target: description:"Callback function that will be executed when all actively running templates have finished executing."

regex.source: description:"This module exposes all the functions and classes from the Obsidian API."
regex.target: description:"This module exposes all the functions and classes from the Obsidian API."

regex.target: description:"This module contains system related functions."

regex.source: description:"Spawns a prompt modal and returns the user's input."
regex.target: description:"Spawns a prompt modal and returns the user's input."

regex.source: description:"Text placed above the input field."
regex.target: description:"Text placed above the input field."

regex.source: description:"A default value for the input field."
regex.target: description:"A default value for the input field."

regex.source: description:"Throws an error if the prompt is canceled, instead of returning a `null` value."
regex.target: description:"Throws an error if the prompt is canceled, instead of returning a `null` value."

regex.source: description:"If set to `true`, the input field will be a multiline textarea. Defaults to `false`."
regex.target: description:"If set to `true`, the input field will be a multiline textarea. Defaults to `false`."

regex.source: description:"Spawns a suggester prompt and returns the user's chosen item."
regex.target: description:"Spawns a suggester prompt and returns the user's chosen item."

regex.source: description:"Array of strings representing the text that will be displayed for each item in the suggester prompt. This can also be a function that maps an item to its text representation."
regex.target: description:"Array of strings representing the text that will be displayed for each item in the suggester prompt. This can also be a function that maps an item to its text representation."

regex.source: description:"Array containing the values of each item in the correct order."
regex.target: description:"Array containing the values of each item in the correct order."

regex.source: description:"Limit the number of items rendered at once (useful to improve performance when displaying large lists)."
regex.target: description:"Limit the number of items rendered at once (useful to improve performance when displaying large lists)."

regex.source: description:"Default value to initialize the suggester with."
regex.target: description:"Default value to initialize the suggester with."

regex.target: name:"Suggester with mapping function (same as above example)"

regex.source: description:"Spawns a suggester prompt that supports selecting multiple items and returns the user's chosen items."
regex.target: description:"Spawns a suggester prompt that supports selecting multiple items and returns the user's chosen items."

regex.source: description:"Text placed at the top of the modal."
regex.target: description:"Text placed at the top of the modal."

regex.source: description:"Default values to initialize the suggester with."
regex.target: description:"Default values to initialize the suggester with."

regex.source: name:"Multi-suggester with mapping function (same as above example)"
regex.target: name:"Multi-suggester with mapping function (same as above example)"

regex.target: description:"Retrieves and parses the daily quote from `https://github.com/Zachatoo/quotes-database` as a callout."

regex.source: description:"Limits selection to photos matching a search term. Multiple search terms can be passed separated by a comma."
regex.target: description:"Limits selection to photos matching a search term. Multiple search terms can be passed separated by a comma."

regex.target: description:"Optional argument to include the specified size in the image link markdown. Defaults to false."
